violations.text: Observed the door to the outside walk-in cooler is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

Observed knife with blue tape around handle on the clean knife rack. PIC removed tape and placed knife in 3 bay sink to be washed, rinsed and sanitize. -In addition, old residue labels observed outside of food containers on the non-food contact surfaces of food containers. Non-food contact surfaces shall be free of old residue labels. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

Paper towel dispensers were observed above/near a pot fill sink and three compartment sink. A sink used for FOOD preparation or UTENSIL washing, or a service sink or curbed cleaning facility used for the disposal of mop water or similar wastes, may not be provided with the handwashing aids and devices required for a HANDWASHING SINK. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

Several foods (see disposal form) were observed held past their seven day date marking. PIC voluntarily disposed of food at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
The ceiling in certain areas of the kitchen is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (several knives and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings observed in dry storage and equipment storage areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The food prep sink is lacking a proper air gap (air break observed). A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
